parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
hide circle
hide empty members

skinparam class {
    BackgroundColor White
    BorderColor Black
    ArrowColor Black
}

skinparam note {
    BackgroundColor White
    BorderColor Black
}

title UML Diagram: DataType CorrespondenceDefinition in Context

note as N1
  **Hints**
  - Move the mouse cursor over a name to see more information.
  - Click on a name to go to the corresponding page.
  - The use of the data type is represented here by a dotted line (not formal UML).
end note

class "CollectionsPattern::\nMap" as Map << (C,#EEEEEE) >> {
  correspondence : CorrespondenceDefinition
}

class "Conceptual::\nConceptMap" as ConceptMap << (C,#EEEEEE) >> {
  correspondence : CorrespondenceDefinition
  displayLabel : <color:blue>LabelForDisplay</color>
  identifier : <color:blue>Identifier</color>
  usage : <color:blue>InternationalString</color>
  validDates : <color:blue>DateRange</color>
}

class "FormatDescription::\nInstanceVariableMap" as InstanceVariableMap << (C,#EEEEEE) >> {
  comparison : <color:blue>ComparisonOperator</color>
  correspondence : CorrespondenceDefinition
  identifier : <color:blue>Identifier</color>
  setValue : String
}

class CorrespondenceDefinition <<dataType>> #Gold {
  commonality : <color:blue>InternationalString</color>
  commonalityCode : <color:blue>ControlledVocabularyEntry</color>
  difference : <color:blue>InternationalString</color>
  matching : <color:blue>MatchingCriterion</color>
}

Map .right. CorrespondenceDefinition
ConceptMap .right. CorrespondenceDefinition
InstanceVariableMap .right. CorrespondenceDefinition

footer DDI Cross Domain Integration (DDI-CDI) 1.0 - StructuredDataTypes::CorrespondenceDefinition
@enduml
```
